question: The bar chart shows the cost from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best describes the trend in costs over these years?

options.A: Costs increased steadily every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.B: Costs were highest in 2022 and lowest in 2018.
options.C: Costs decreased every year from 2019 to 2021.
options.D: Costs were the same in 2019 and 2021.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
